title: Plastiform
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Plastiform''' was a packing material. It was blown into a package and would keep the contents safe from sharp movements.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]''
*''[[Galaxy of Fear: Spore]]''
*[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 2|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 2]] {{Mo}}

[[Category:Substances]]
